Update received yesterday in Romania. Galaxy Fold5

I'm looking forward to this wide fold. First time I saw the Huawei wide fold I was immediately sold. I'm a sucker for wider, less tall screens and that's no different when it comes to folding devices (that's what I don't like with flip phones where the screen is mostly 21:9 or narrow and tall). I own a fold 7 and a pixel pro 9 fold and both are fine (with a slight pref for the pixel as it has a 20:9 outer screen) but it's not really my cup of tea besides the inner screens of course as they are the USP of such folding devices. Let's hope the price won't be higher than the regular fold (but knowing how Samsung thinks it most probably will be pitched as more premium than the regular one).
